description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix strategy with multiple jobs on ubuntu-18.04 and macos-10.15, each with different compiler configurations (gcc-8, gcc-9, clang-6, clang-9) and build settings. For each job, check out the repository, then either use CMake or Make to build and test the project, and optionally upload code coverage to Codecov.
